provisions.title: AMENDING EXECUTIVE ORDER NO.607
provisions.content:
-448-

    MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO D’OMINGO.
                    Executive Order No. 661.
              A?nendi?iy E x e c u t i v e Order. K O . 607.
                         0. G. NG.3245.
     By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
     ARTICLE 1. Executive Order No. 607 is hereby amended
as follows:
     (a) item 1055: 1 Inspector, Superior Normal School, 12
months a t $100.00, $1,200.00 per annum, is amended to read
as follows :
    L<
      1 Icspectgr, S u p r i o r Normal School, PO mwths--January,
    April. May, J u n z , July, August, September, Ocbber, Nov-
    errhcr 2nd 1 1 e c x d . w at $100 .OO, $1,000.00 per aiinum.”
     (b) I t e m 1070 : 1 Teacher (female), Girls’ Graded School
No. 2, 11 months a t $30.00, $330.00 per annum, is amended to
read as follows :
     “1 Teache.r (female), Girls, Grzded School No. 2, 1 month
     at $60.00 and 11 !ronths at $30.00, $399 .OO per annum.”
     (c) I t e m 1372: 1. Director, Primary Rural School No. 9,
12 months a t $40.00, $480.00 per annum, is amended to read as
follows :
    “month of January $40.00.”
     (d) Ztenz 1474: Thc t7tal of tbiq item is reduced from
$7,017.84 t o $6,177.84.
     These amendments do not alter the total of $684,328.00 in
Executive Order No. 607.
     ARTICLE 2. This Order is promulgated so as to have
retroactive effect, as of the date of Executive Order No. 607.
     ARTICLE 3. All laws and parts of laws in conflict here-
with are hereby repealed.‘

                                     S. S. ROBISON,
                          Rear-Admiral, United States Navy,
                         Military Governor of Santo Domingo.

Santo Dcmingo, D. It.,
August 9, 1921.
